1	name: QPDF Build
2	env:
3	  QTEST_COLOR: 1
4	on:
5	  push:
6	    branches:
7	      - main
8	      - build
9	      - build/*
10	  pull_request:
11	  schedule:
12	    # Building regularly with cron makes it safe for us to use
13	    # *-latest with runs-on. If a new version of tools or agents comes
14	    # out, we'll find out fast if our builds break on it because we
15	    # have reliable testing.
16	    - cron: '12 4 * * 5'
17	jobs:
18	  Prebuild:
19	    # Run steps that are needed by the Windows build but are easier to
20	    # build on Linux. Also create the documentation distribution.
21	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
22	    steps:
23	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
24	      - name: 'Run pre-build steps'
25	        run: build-scripts/prebuild
26	        env:
27	          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
28	      - name: 'Upload documentation for later build steps'
29	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
30	        with:
31	          name: doc
32	          path: doc.zip
33	      - name: 'Upload external libs'
34	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
35	        with:
36	          name: distribution-vcpkg
37	          path: vcpkg.zip
38	      - name: 'Upload doc distribution'
39	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
40	        with:
41	          name: distribution-prebuild
42	          path: distribution
43	  Linux:
44	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
45	    steps:
46	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
47	      - name: 'Generate, build, and test'
48	        run: build-scripts/build-linux
49	      - name: Upload distribution
50	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
51	        with:
52	          name: distribution-linux
53	          path: distribution
54	  Windows:
55	    runs-on: windows-latest
56	    needs: Prebuild
57	    strategy:
58	      fail-fast: false
59	      max-parallel: 4
60	      matrix:
61	        tool: [msvc, mingw]
62	        wordsize: [64, 32]
63	    steps:
64	      - name: 'Disable git autocrlf'
65	        shell: bash
66	        run: git config --global core.autocrlf input
67	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
68	      - name: 'Download documentation'
69	        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
70	        with:
71	          name: doc
72	          path: .
73	      - name: 'Download vcpkg cache'
74	        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
75	        with:
76	          name: distribution-vcpkg
77	          path: .
78	      - name: 'Build, test, generate binary distributions'
79	        shell: cmd
80	        run: build-scripts/build-windows.bat ${{ matrix.wordsize }} ${{ matrix.tool }}
81	      - name: 'Upload binary distributions'
82	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
83	        with:
84	          name: distribution-windows-${{ matrix.wordsize }}-${{ matrix.tool }}
85	          path: distribution
86	  macOS:
87	    runs-on: macos-latest
88	    needs: Prebuild
89	    steps:
90	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
91	      - name: 'Mac build and test'
92	        run: build-scripts/build-mac
93	  AppImage:
94	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
95	    needs: Prebuild
96	    steps:
97	      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
98	      - name: 'Build AppImage'
99	        run: build-scripts/build-appimage
100	      - name: 'Upload AppImage'
101	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
102	        with:
103	          name: distribution-appimage
104	          path: distribution
105	  pikepdf:
106	    strategy:
107	      fail-fast: false
108	      max-parallel: 1
109	      matrix:
110	        future: ['', 'future']
111	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

file.content:
name: QPDF Build
env:
  QTEST_COLOR: 1
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - build
      - build/*
  pull_request:
  schedule:
    # Building regularly with cron makes it safe for us to use
    # *-latest with runs-on. If a new version of tools or agents comes
    # out, we'll find out fast if our builds break on it because we
    # have reliable testing.
    - cron: '12 4 * * 5'
jobs:
  Prebuild:
    # Run steps that are needed by the Windows build but are easier to
    # build on Linux. Also create the documentation distribution.
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Run pre-build steps'
        run: build-scripts/prebuild
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
      - name: 'Upload documentation for later build steps'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: doc
          path: doc.zip
      - name: 'Upload external libs'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: distribution-vcpkg
          path: vcpkg.zip
      - name: 'Upload doc distribution'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: distribution-prebuild
          path: distribution
  Linux:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Generate, build, and test'
        run: build-scripts/build-linux
      - name: Upload distribution
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: distribution-linux
          path: distribution
  Windows:
    runs-on: windows-latest
    needs: Prebuild
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      max-parallel: 4
      matrix:
        tool: [msvc, mingw]
        wordsize: [64, 32]
    steps:
      - name: 'Disable git autocrlf'
        shell: bash
        run: git config --global core.autocrlf input
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Download documentation'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
        with:
          name: doc
          path: .
      - name: 'Download vcpkg cache'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v8
        with:
          name: distribution-vcpkg
          path: .
      - name: 'Build, test, generate binary distributions'
        shell: cmd
        run: build-scripts/build-windows.bat ${{ matrix.wordsize }} ${{ matrix.tool }}
      - name: 'Upload binary distributions'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: distribution-windows-${{ matrix.wordsize }}-${{ matrix.tool }}
          path: distribution
  macOS:
    runs-on: macos-latest
    needs: Prebuild
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Mac build and test'
        run: build-scripts/build-mac
  AppImage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: Prebuild
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Build AppImage'
        run: build-scripts/build-appimage
      - name: 'Upload AppImage'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: distribution-appimage
          path: distribution
  pikepdf:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      max-parallel: 1
      matrix:
        future: ['', 'future']
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: Prebuild
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'pikepdf'
        run: build-scripts/test-pikepdf ${{ matrix.future }}
  Sanitizers:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: Prebuild
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Sanitizer Tests'
        run: build-scripts/test-sanitizers
  Zopfli:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: Prebuild
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Zopfli Tests'
        run: build-scripts/test-zopfli
  CodeCov:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: Prebuild
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Code Coverage'
        run: build-scripts/test-coverage
      - id: set_branch
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "push" ]; then
            echo "override_branch=${GITHUB_REF#refs/heads/}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "override_branch=" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v6
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          override_branch: ${{ steps.set_branch.outputs.override_branch }}
  QuickJobs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: Prebuild
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      max-parallel: 3
      matrix:
        script:
          - build-fuzzer
          - pkg-test
          - build-linux32
          - test-alt-zlib
          - test-unsigned-char
          - test-c++-next
          - build-android-ndk
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: ${{ matrix.script }}
        run: build-scripts/${{ matrix.script }}
  MergeArtifacts:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs:
       - Prebuild
       - Linux
       - Windows
       - AppImage
     steps:
       - name: Merge Artifacts
         uses: actions/upload-artifact/merge@v7
         with:
           name: distribution
           pattern: distribution-*

#!/bin/bash
set -e
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get -y install \
   build-essential cmake \
   zlib1g-dev libjpeg-dev libgnutls28-dev libssl-dev
cmake -S . -B build \
    -DCXX_NEXT=ON \
    -DCI_MODE=1 -DBUILD_STATIC_LIBS=0 -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
    -DREQUIRE_CRYPTO_OPENSSL=1 -DREQUIRE_CRYPTO_GNUTLS=1 \
    -DENABLE_QTC=1
cmake --build build --verbose -j$(nproc) -- -k
cd build
ctest --verbose

    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
